statements.pro: Large projects deliver many homes at once and therefore make a relatively large contribution to solving the housing shortage.
statements.con: Small projects can be realized faster and therefore relatively quickly contribute to solving the housing shortage.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must continue to prioritise large housing projects over smaller projects of fewer than six homes.

statements.title: The municipality should only cooperate on wind turbines if they are placed along the highway.
statements.pro: In that way we limit the nuisance for residents. In that way we prevent damage to the landscape and nature as much as possible.
statements.con: To meet climate targets we will need to install wind turbines in more places. The municipality can also seek other locations where local residents can share in the benefits.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should only cooperate on wind turbines if they are placed along the highway.

statements.title: The income threshold for poverty assistance (such as exceptional financial aid) must be raised so that more people receive financial support.
statements.pro: Too many residents are currently struggling to make ends meet, even though they are above the official income threshold.
statements.con: Poverty assistance is intended only for those who need help the most.
statements.titleEn: The income threshold for poverty assistance (such as exceptional financial aid) must be raised so that more people receive financial support.

statements.title: The municipality of Deurne must distribute free tampons and sanitary pads to people who cannot afford them.
statements.pro: These are basic products that everyone must be able to obtain; lack of money should not be a problem.
statements.con: The municipality does not need to organize this separately. Other organizations can do it, for example the food bank.
statements.titleEn: The municipality of Deurne must distribute free tampons and sanitary pads to people who cannot afford them.

statements.title: Not only at the Binderendreef but also at the Liesselseweg there should be a road tunnel for cars under the railway.
statements.pro: A tunnel increases traffic safety at this location. A tunnel provides better traffic flow. The double intersection with traffic lights and the level crossing currently cause congestion.
statements.con: A tunnel at that location will lead to more through traffic across the center. In the long term a second rail tunnel might be a good idea, but the municipality should consider that later.
statements.titleEn: Not only at the Binderendreef but also at the Liesselseweg there should be a road tunnel for cars under the railway.

statements.title: People on social assistance must be given more freedom to earn extra income.
statements.pro: In this way people can gain work experience again, which reduces the distance to the labor market and increases their chance of leaving social assistance. Work should always pay; earning your own money should not be discouraged or punished.
statements.con: This could lead to unfair situations. People who can earn extra would receive the same benefit as people who cannot. Instead of earning extra, these people could perform unpaid, socially useful work as a form of reciprocity.
statements.titleEn: People on social assistance must be given more freedom to earn extra income.

statements.title: After the closure of OJC de Roos the municipality must set up a new youth centre in Deurne.
statements.moreInfo: Due to rent arrears caused in part by rising energy costs and ongoing costs during the corona years, the Open Youth Center De Roos must close at Haageind. The center organized music nights and other events for young people.
statements.pro: Young people in the municipality of Deurne should have a pleasant and safe place to meet, relax and develop themselves.
statements.con: It is not necessary to build a new center; the municipality can also look for an existing suitable building.
statements.titleEn: After the closure of OJC de Roos the municipality must set up a new youth centre in Deurne.

statements.title: The municipality must introduce an environmental zone to keep polluting vehicles out of Deurne’s centre.
statements.pro: An environmental zone can help quickly meet standards for clean and healthy air. It is more pleasant to live in the center without nuisance from these vehicles. An environmental zone can be a first step toward a car-free center.
statements.con: A low-emission zone is not necessary. In some places in the municipality trucks are already banned; that ban should be better enforced. A low-emission zone is bad for the accessibility of center businesses. Promoting clean transport is better than banning certain vehicles.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must introduce an environmental zone to keep polluting vehicles out of Deurne’s centre.

statements.title: The municipality must give priority to local entrepreneurs when allocating sites on business parks.
statements.pro: Local entrepreneurs often have stronger social ties to Deurne. Economic growth should primarily benefit local businesses.
statements.con: It does not matter where entrepreneurs come from, as long as they add value to Deurne. Equal rules for all businesses are better for economic growth.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must give priority to local entrepreneurs when allocating sites on business parks.

statements.title: The municipality must do everything possible to generate as much energy in 2050 as is consumed in Deurne.
statements.pro: This is necessary to combat climate change. Innovative solutions make this goal achievable, for example investing in storage of energy from solar panels or wind turbines.
statements.con: The municipality must remain realistic. Being climate-neutral by 2050 is not achievable. Rapid sustainability measures would impose excessive costs on residents.
statements.titleEn: The municipality must do everything possible to generate as much energy in 2050 as is consumed in Deurne.

statements.title: The municipality should organize a fireworks show on New Year's Eve.
statements.pro: Such a fireworks show brings residents together, which is good for community spirit. An organized fireworks show is safer than residents who otherwise set off (illegal) fireworks themselves.
statements.con: Local communities or associations can organize this; the municipality is not an events agency. A fireworks show is a waste of money.
statements.titleEn: The municipality should organize a fireworks show on New Year's Eve.

shootoutStatements.title: The municipality should take on more risk itself and buy land for housing projects.
The municipality should give priority to starter homes, social rental housing and housing for the elderly over family homes or more luxurious housing.
The municipality should accommodate asylum seekers only in small-scale centers of a maximum of 30 people and allocate funds for this.
The fireworks ban should be strictly enforced in Deurne.
The municipality should adequately support neighborhood crime prevention with neighborhood watches and dedicated app groups.
The municipality should use the greenhouse horticulture area along the N270 between Deurne and Venray for solar parks.
shootoutStatements.moreInfo: Het gaat om het gebied ten zuiden van de N270, van in totaal zo'n 170 hectare. Hiervan zou 120 hectare worden ontwikkeld voor de glastuinbouw, maar vanwege stikstofbeperkingen en watertekort is dit niet haalbaar. Daarom wordt nu gezocht naar een alternatieve bestemming.

shootoutStatements.title: New homes should mainly be built in the church villages.
The municipality should promote innovative technologies for sustainable energy instead of solar parks and wind turbines.
The municipality of Deurne should spend more money on integrating newcomers into society.
The municipality should continue to press Staatsbosbeheer to close off the Deurnese Peel and Mariapeel when nature requires it.
shootoutStatements.moreInfo: De Deurnese Peel en de Mariapeel zijn hoogveen-gebieden. De natuur staat hier onder druk, onder andere door verdroging en door stikstof. Ook recreatie is een probleem voor herstellend hoogveen, zowel voor kwetsbare planten als voor diersoorten zoals kraanvogels en dassen. De gemeente kan natuurherstel bijvoorbeeld bevorderen door recreatie af te sturen van kwetsbare gebieden, door gebieden af te sluiten of door overleg met het Waterschap over het reguleren van grondwaterstanden.

shootoutStatements.title: The municipality should develop the greenhouse horticulture area along the N270 between Deurne and Venray with modern businesses in the food, energy and technology sectors.
shootoutStatements.moreInfo: Het gaat om het gebied ten zuiden van de N270, van in totaal zo'n 170 hectare. Hiervan zou 120 hectare worden ontwikkeld voor de glastuinbouw, maar vanwege stikstofbeperkingen en watertekort is dit niet haalbaar. Daarom wordt nu gezocht naar een alternatieve bestemming.

shootoutStatements.title: People in Deurne who receive welfare benefits should do socially useful work in return.
